pr.title: Render invoice line
pr.description: Formats a total with its currency for display.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+class InvoiceFormatter
+  def render(total, currency)
+    format = "%.2f"
+    line = format(format, total)
+    "#{line} #{currency}"
+  end
+end
+

planted_defects.description: Shadowed builtin: the local variable 'format' shadows Kernel#format in this method scope, so the next line's 'format(format, total)' tries to call the String local variable as a method and raises NoMethodError instead of invoking the intended formatter.
